title: Darna
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the term|the [[Darna (pilot)|pilot]]}}
[[Darna]] was the [[Yevethan (language)|Yevethan]] term for a [[Yevetha]]n [[Gender/Legends|male's]] senior mate. While there were no limits on the number of females a powerful [[nitakka]] could have as breeding mates, his darna always had a place of honor in his family. A young nitakka was chosen by his darna, not the other way around. [[Kei]] was the darna of [[Nil Spaar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Before the Storm (abridged audiobook)|''Before the Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
